name: CiteThis
description: Evidence-based research syntheses with actionable protocols. Publisher, not an interactive agent.

capabilities.name: protocol_index
capabilities.description: Machine-readable index of all published protocols with TL;DRs, evidence levels, tags, and canonical URLs.

capabilities.name: protocol_markdown
capabilities.description: Raw markdown for any protocol. Append .md to the canonical URL.

capabilities.name: llms_full
capabilities.description: Complete content of all protocols in a single request, optimized for LLM context windows.

license: Content free to cite with attribution.
